raw:
{
  "verses": [
    {
      "n": 5,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Bet tas KUNGS fazzija
us Akiju: Raugi/ Jerobeama
Seewa nahk no tewim kahou
Leetu waſzaht fawa Dehla pehz/
jo wiꞥſch irr neweſſels. Ta un
ta buhs tew us winnu runnaht/
kad tas buhs/ ka winna nahk/
un fwefcha liſſees.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 6,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Kad nu Akijus dsirdeja
winnas Rahju Grabbeschamu pa
Durwin ee-eetam/ tad fazzija
wiꞥſch : Nahz eekſcha Jerobeama
Seewa/kapehz leezees tutik fwef-
scha? Jo es efimu pee tew fuh-
tihts ar gruhtahm Wehstim.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 7,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Eij/ fakki Jerobeaman: Ta
fakka tas KUNGS Israëta
Deews: Tapehz ka es tew pa-
augstinajs no teem Laudim/ un
tew par Walditaju darrijs pahr
manneem Israëta Laudim.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 8,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Un to Walstibu no Dah-
wida Namma atrahwis/ un tew
to dewis. Un tu ne effi bijis fa
mans Kalps Dahwids/kas man-
nus Bauffus turreja / un kas
pehz mannim dstinnes ar wiſſu
fawu Sirdi/ darridams ween /
kas pareisi irr preekſch mannahn
Azzim.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 9,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Bet tu effi taunu darrijs
wairaſ ne ka wiſſi/ kas preekſch
tew btjuschi/ un gahjis/ un tew
zittus Deewus darrijs/ un leetas
Bildes darrijs mann apfaitina
"
    },
    {
      "n": 1,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "dams/ un tu effi mann a
mettis.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 10,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Tapehz reds/ es wedi
ſchu Laununu pahr Jerobeam
Naminu / un isdeldefschu no T
robeama wiſſu/ kas pee Seen
meesn/to Aisflehgtu unPameſ
rektſch Israëta. Un ismehſſſſ
"
    },
    {
      "n": 11,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "ta Namma Jerobeama Peſ
nahkamus/ ittin ka Suhdi to
ismehſti/ teekams tas wiſſai bu
isnthzinahts.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 12,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Kas no Jerobeama Pi
fahta mirſt/ to ehdihs tee Su
ri/un kas Lanká mirſt/ to ehdi
tee Putut appakſch Debbeſſu
jo tas KUNGS irr to runna
"
    },
    {
      "n": 13,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Tu tad zellees / eij
Mahjahin / un kad tawas Ri
jas Pulsfahta ee-ees / tad t
Behrns nomirs.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 14,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Un wiſſ Israëts pahr
ſchehlofees/ un winnu apraks/
ſchis ween no Jerobeama naſ
Rappa/ tapehz ka eekſch ta kah
Labbums irr atrasts/no ta KU
GA Israëta Deewa/ Jerobeam
Naminá.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 15,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Bet tas KUNGS ee-
fewim weenu Kehniku pahr Je-
elu/ kas Jerobeama Naminu
Deenaá isdeldehs. Un ko ?
jaw klahtn irr ?
"
    }
  ],
  "confidence": "high",
  "notes": ""
}
